text:
First, note: Asia/Singapore is UTC+8 (since 1901; before that it was UTC+6:55:25, but for 1861 we'll use the historical offset for Singapore Mean Time: UTC+6:55:25).  
US/Mountain in 1861 would be local mean time for longitude, roughly UTC-7 (but not standardized until 1883). For simplicity, assume UTC-7 for Denver/Cheyenne area in 1861.  

Time given: 1861-10-28 21:00 UTC-7.  
Convert to UTC: 21:00 + 7 hours = 1861-10-29 04:00 UTC.  
Convert to Singapore Mean Time: 04:00 UTC + 6h 55m 25s ≈ 1861-10-29 10:55:25.  

Rounding to nearest minute: 10:55.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1861-10-29 10:55
